homepage.heroSubline: Durable paving solutions built to withstand the Hampton Roads climate. Quality workmanship, guaranteed.
aboutText: Paragon Paving Inc. has been laying the groundwork for Virginia Beach businesses and homes for over a decade. Founded by local paving veterans, we understand the unique challenges our coastal environment presents – from salt air corrosion to hurricane-force weather. We've built our reputation on providing lasting solutions that stand the test of time.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. That means using only the highest-quality materials, employing skilled craftsmen, and adhering to strict industry standards. Our commitment to excellence ensures a smooth, durable, and attractive surface, whether it's a commercial parking lot or a residential driveway.

Paragon Paving is deeply invested in the Virginia Beach community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities and initiatives. When you choose us, you're not just getting superior paving – you're supporting a business that cares about its neighbors.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise

valueProps.description: We stand behind our work and ensure your complete satisfaction with every project.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a free estimate and let us pave the way for your next project.

services.name: Asphalt Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and cost-effective asphalt paving for driveways, parking lots, and more.
services.description:
Asphalt paving remains a popular choice for both residential and commercial properties due to its durability, cost-effectiveness, and ease of maintenance. At Paragon Paving, we utilize the latest techniques and equipment to ensure a smooth, long-lasting asphalt surface. Our asphalt paving services include site preparation, grading, base installation, asphalt application, and compaction. We carefully assess the specific needs of each project to determine the optimal asphalt mix and thickness, ensuring maximum durability and resistance to Virginia Beach's weather conditions.

From driveways and walkways to parking lots and roadways, we handle projects of all sizes with precision and expertise. We understand the importance of proper drainage and slope to prevent water damage and extend the life of your asphalt pavement. Our experienced team meticulously prepares the subgrade to ensure a stable foundation and prevent cracking or shifting over time.

We also offer asphalt repair and maintenance services to keep your pavement looking its best and prevent costly repairs down the road. Whether you need crack filling, patching, or sealcoating, we have the solutions to protect your investment and extend the life of your asphalt pavement.
process: Step 4: Quality Control and Finishing Touches

faq.question: How long does asphalt paving last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, asphalt paving can last 15-20 years or more in the Virginia Beach climate.

faq.question: What is the best time of year for asphalt paving?
faq.answer: The ideal time for asphalt paving is during the warmer months, typically from spring to fall, when temperatures are consistently above freezing.

faq.question: How soon can I drive on my new asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: We recommend waiting at least 24-48 hours before driving on your new asphalt driveway to allow it to fully cure and harden.

services.name: Concrete Paving
services.shortDescription: Versatile and durable concrete paving for patios, sidewalks, and foundations.
services.description:
Concrete paving offers a versatile and durable solution for a wide range of applications, from patios and sidewalks to foundations and retaining walls. Paragon Paving specializes in providing high-quality concrete paving services that meet the specific needs of our clients in Virginia Beach. We use only the finest concrete mixes and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure a smooth, strong, and attractive surface.

Our concrete paving services include site preparation, formwork, concrete pouring, finishing, and curing. We carefully consider factors such as soil conditions, drainage, and load requirements to ensure the long-term stability and performance of your concrete pavement. We also offer a variety of decorative concrete options, including stamped concrete, colored concrete, and exposed aggregate, to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your property.

Whether you're looking to create a beautiful outdoor living space or need a reliable foundation for your new home, Paragon Paving has the expertise and experience to deliver exceptional results. We understand the importance of proper concrete curing to prevent cracking and ensure maximum strength. Our team meticulously monitors the curing process to ensure your concrete pavement stands the test of time.

faq.question: How long does concrete paving last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, concrete paving can last 30 years or more.

faq.question: What is the difference between concrete and asphalt?
faq.answer: Concrete is typically more durable and longer-lasting than asphalt, but it is also more expensive. Asphalt is more flexible and easier to repair, but it may require more frequent maintenance.

faq.question: How can I prevent my concrete from cracking?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation, the use of quality concrete mixes, and proper curing techniques are essential for preventing concrete cracking.

services.name: Pavement Repair
services.shortDescription: Timely pavement repair services to address cracks, potholes, and other damage.
services.description:
Don't let cracks, potholes, and other pavement damage compromise the safety and appearance of your property. Paragon Paving offers comprehensive pavement repair services to address a wide range of issues and restore your pavement to its original condition. Our experienced team utilizes the latest techniques and materials to provide durable and cost-effective repairs that extend the life of your pavement.

Our pavement repair services include crack filling, pothole patching, asphalt resurfacing, and concrete spall repair. We carefully assess the extent of the damage and recommend the most appropriate repair solution for your specific needs. We understand the importance of timely repairs to prevent further deterioration and minimize the risk of accidents.

Whether you need to repair a small crack in your driveway or resurface an entire parking lot, Paragon Paving has the expertise and equipment to get the job done right. We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure a seamless and long-lasting repair. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly repairs down the road.

faq.question: How often should I repair my pavement?
faq.answer: The frequency of pavement repair depends on the severity of the damage and the level of traffic. We recommend inspecting your pavement regularly and addressing any issues as soon as they arise.

faq.question: What is the best way to repair a pothole?
faq.answer: The best way to repair a pothole is to clean out the damaged area, apply a tack coat, and then fill the pothole with a high-quality asphalt patching material.

faq.question: How can I prevent pavement damage?
faq.answer: Proper drainage, regular sealcoating, and timely repairs are essential for preventing pavement damage.

services.name: Sealcoating
services.shortDescription: Protect your asphalt investment with professional sealcoating services.
services.description:
Sealcoating is a crucial preventative maintenance measure that protects your asphalt pavement from the damaging effects of weather, traffic, and chemicals. Paragon Paving offers professional sealcoating services that extend the life of your asphalt pavement and enhance its appearance. Our experienced team uses only high-quality sealants and applies them with precision to ensure maximum protection.

Sealcoating creates a protective barrier that prevents water penetration, oxidation, and chemical damage. It also helps to fill in minor cracks and imperfections, creating a smoother and more uniform surface. Regular sealcoating can significantly extend the life of your asphalt pavement and save you money on costly repairs in the long run.

We offer a variety of sealcoating options to meet the specific needs of our clients in Virginia Beach. Our team will assess the condition of your pavement and recommend the most appropriate sealant for your application. We also offer crack filling and other preparatory services to ensure a smooth and long-lasting sealcoat.
process: Step 2: Crack Filling and Repair (if needed)

faq.question: How often should I sealcoat my asphalt pavement?
faq.answer: We recommend sealcoating your asphalt pavement every 2-3 years to maintain its protective barrier.

faq.question: What is the best time of year for sealcoating?
faq.answer: The best time of year for sealcoating is during the warmer months, typically from spring to fall, when temperatures are consistently above freezing.

faq.question: How long does sealcoating take to dry?
faq.answer: Sealcoating typically takes 24-48 hours to fully dry, depending on the weather conditions.

services.name: Parking Lot Paving
services.shortDescription: Expert parking lot paving services for businesses of all sizes.
services.description:
A well-paved parking lot is essential for creating a positive first impression and ensuring the safety and convenience of your customers and employees. Paragon Paving specializes in providing expert parking lot paving services for businesses of all sizes in Virginia Beach. We understand the importance of proper design, drainage, and traffic flow to create a functional and attractive parking lot.

Our parking lot paving services include site preparation, grading, base installation, asphalt or concrete paving, striping, and signage. We carefully consider factors such as traffic volume, vehicle weight, and drainage requirements to ensure a durable and long-lasting parking lot. We also offer a variety of pavement markings and signage options to enhance safety and accessibility.

Whether you're building a new parking lot or need to resurface an existing one, Paragon Paving has the expertise and equipment to deliver exceptional results. We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure a smooth, safe, and attractive parking lot that meets your specific needs.

faq.question: What are the key considerations for parking lot paving?
faq.answer: Key considerations include traffic volume, vehicle weight, drainage requirements, and local regulations.

faq.question: How much does parking lot paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of parking lot paving depends on several factors, including the size of the parking lot, the type of pavement used, and the complexity of the project. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: How long does parking lot paving take?
faq.answer: The duration of parking lot paving depends on the size and complexity of the project. We will provide you with a detailed timeline before starting work.

services.name: Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's curb appeal with professional driveway paving services.
services.description:
Your driveway is one of the first things people see when they arrive at your home. Paragon Paving offers professional driveway paving services that enhance your home's curb appeal and provide a smooth, durable, and attractive surface for your vehicles. We understand the importance of proper drainage and slope to prevent water damage and ensure the longevity of your driveway.

Our driveway paving services include site preparation, grading, base installation, asphalt or concrete paving, and decorative options such as stamped concrete and exposed aggregate. We carefully consider your budget and aesthetic preferences to create a driveway that complements your home's style and meets your specific needs. We know that many homes in the Oceanfront area have unique challenges due to the sandy soil and proximity to the ocean, and we ensure that proper techniques are used to mitigate potential issues.

Whether you're building a new home or need to replace an existing driveway, Paragon Paving has the expertise and experience to deliver exceptional results. We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure a smooth, durable, and attractive driveway that will last for years to come.

faq.question: What are the different types of driveway paving?
faq.answer: The most common types of driveway paving are asphalt and concrete. Asphalt is more cost-effective, while concrete is more durable and offers more design options.

faq.question: How much does driveway paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of driveway paving depends on several factors, including the size of the driveway, the type of pavement used, and the complexity of the project. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: How long does driveway paving take?
faq.answer: The duration of driveway paving depends on the size and complexity of the project. We will provide you with a detailed timeline before starting work.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Paragon Paving did an excellent job replacing our old, cracked driveway. They were professional, efficient, and the new asphalt looks fantastic. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We had several potholes in our parking lot that needed repair. Paragon Paving came out quickly and patched them up perfectly. Great service at a fair price.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Paragon Paving sealcoated our driveway and it looks brand new! They were very thorough and took the time to do the job right. We'll definitely use them again.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: The team at Paragon Paving did an amazing job installing a concrete patio in our backyard. Their attention to detail was impressive, and we're thrilled with the final result. The stamped concrete looks great!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Paragon Paving repaved our entire parking lot. The job was completed on time and within budget. The new asphalt surface is a huge improvement.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: I had a large crack in my asphalt driveway that was getting worse. Paragon Paving repaired it quickly and professionally. You can barely tell there was ever a crack there!
